name: Kahlua Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, melt chocolate and butter over simmering water.
2. Combine powdered sugar, egg yolks, Kahlua, and instant coffee in a separate bowl.
3. Blend in the melted chocolate mixture.
4. Whip the heavy whipping cream until stiff peaks form; fold into the Kahlua-chocolate mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form; fold into the mixture.
6. Spoon the mousse into a serving bowl or dessert glassware.
7. Refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.
